name: graphite-frontend-tooling
description: Dev-only tooling package (WO-G1): generates frontend/src/api/api.generated.ts from the committed openapi.json. The real Vite app lands in WO-G2 -- this package.json exists only to pin openapi-typescript as a devDependency so `npm ci` is reproducible; a wheel install of graphite never needs Node (spec 02 sec. 5).
